title: Convenience Recipes
description: Adds convenient recipes and buffs crafting amounts for certain recipes. Compatible with various mods.
body:
Adds useful crafting recipes such as logs to chests, logs to sticks, packing recipes, unpacking recipes and increases the amount of stairs, walls, trapdoors and other items similarly to VanillaTweaks without breaking balance.

![Some recipes added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd6d37a4667c770990de70eeac5706193377739d.png)

Compatible with the following mods on top of Vanilla recipes:

- Applied Energistics 2
- Ars Nouveau
- Create
- Create Deco
- The Factory Must Grow
- Elementalcraft
- Hexerei
- Integrated Dynamics
- Supplementaries
- Tinkers' Construct

Feel free to use in your modpacks.
